what_it_does: This file is a JSON allocation batch that lists six React JSX component files from the claude-ds project, identifying each by project name, relative path, and filesystem root for interpretive processing.
observations: Contains a JSON array of six entries.
Every entry belongs to project 'claude-ds' and root '/home/tim/company/design/claude-ds'.
Component names are ExportPatch, ImageEditor, KitPreviews, MaskEditor, Pano360, and RefinePop.
No code symbols are included; only file-location metadata is present.
standouts: Batch identifier 'batch-009' under 'wave-002/alloc' suggests a staged, wave-based interpretive pipeline.
All listed files are UI components, likely related to image editing, previews, masks, 360 panoramas, and refinement workflows.
concerns: The file lists component paths but provides no extracted symbols, dependencies, or functional descriptions, so downstream interpretation must resolve those from source.
Selection rationale for this specific batch is not stated.
notes: A location-only manifest for a batch of claude-ds UI components awaiting deeper symbol extraction and interpretation.
questions: What criteria grouped these six components into batch-009?
Are these components interdependent or independently selectable?
Why are no symbols present for component files that presumably export React components?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears to serve as an allocation list for a wave/batch interpretive pass, and it does exactly that: it enumerates target files without analysis.
intention_signals: The file seems to be trying to stage a specific slice of a design-system codebase for downstream interpretive or fusion work, using a predictable project/path/root schema.
contribution: Provides a normalized, machine-readable set of pointers to specific component files, which a fused system can use as a reliable index into the claude-ds source tree.
summary_for_embedding: A wave-002 allocation batch JSON listing six React JSX component paths in the claude-ds project under app/components.
intention_for_embedding: To register a batch of UI component files for staged interpretive analysis.
